reminders.text: Scan tasks/ for duplicates, misplaced files, stale drafts. Verify workers are active.
git status --short. Check branch, uncommitted changes, remote divergence.
If no operator contact in 10 min, notify current status.
Check worker sessions. Ping any silent >10 min. Ask workers their reminders to verify behavior.
Compare get_me().mcp_commit with dist/tools/build-info.json. Prompt restart on drift.
If idle with no active work, show_animation(preset: waiting, persistent: true). cancel_animation before any substantive reply.
